zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Hawley I於大約1330年出生在英國林可爾史爾武特比時，他的父親William Hawley21歲，母親Alicia Fenn19歲。他於1374年與Beatrice在英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1387年11月3日在英國越可爾英格萊頓享年58歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可伍德布里奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Hawley I于大约1330年出生在英国林可爾史爾武特比时，他的父亲William Hawley21岁，母亲Alicia Fenn19岁。他于1374年与Beatrice在英国林可爾史爾吉爾頓结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1387年11月3日在英国越可爾英格萊頓享年58岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可伍德布里奇。

nameMeanings.name: Hawley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost place called Hawley in Sheffield (Yorkshire). The placename derives from Old Norse haugr ‘hill, burial mound’ + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Hawley I was born about 1330, in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, his father, William Hawley, was 21 and his mother, Alicia Fenn, was 19. He married Beatrice in 1374, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 3 November 1387, in Ingleton, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 58, and was buried in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Hawley I est né environ 1330, à Utterby, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, William Hawley, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Alicia Fenn, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Beatrice en 1374, à Kirton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 3 novembre 1387, à Ingleton, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à Woodbridge, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Hawley I um 1330 in Utterby, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Hawley 21 und seine Mutter Alicia Fenn 19. Er hat 1374 in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England Beatrice geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 3. November 1387 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Ingleton, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Woodbridge, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hawley I è nato il circa 1330 nel Utterby, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, William Hawley, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Alicia Fenn, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Beatrice nel 1374, nel Kirton, Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 3 novembre 1387, nel Ingleton, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a Woodbridge, Suffolk, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Hawley Iが約1330年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウッテルビーで生まれた時，父William Hawleyは21歳，母Alicia Fennは19歳であった。1374年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンでBeatriceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1387年11月3日にイギリスヨークシュアイアイングレトンで58歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクウッドブリッジにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Hawley I(이)가 대략 1330년 영국 링코실르 우터비에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Hawley(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia Fenn(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1374년 영국 링코실르 커턴에서 Beatrice(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1387년 11월 3일 영국 요르크실르 잉글레턴에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 우드브리지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Hawley I nasceu aproximadamente 1330, em Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Hawley, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Alicia Fenn, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Beatrice em 1374, em Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 3 de novembro de 1387, em Ingleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Hawley I родился около 1330 г. в местности уттирби, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Hawley было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Alicia Fenn, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Beatrice в 1374 г. в местности киртон, линколншир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 3 ноября 1387 г. в местности инглетон, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности вудбридж, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Hawley I nació aproximadamente 1330, en Utterby, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Hawley, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Alicia Fenn, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Beatrice en 1374, en Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 3 de noviembre de 1387, en Ingleton, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en Woodbridge, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
